description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the maven:latest Docker image and defines a single stage called build. Add a job named build that runs in the build stage and executes the exact shell commands: git clone https://gitlab.com/SiLA2/sila_base.git; pushd sila_base; mvn install; popd and then cd sila-executor; mvn package. No services, caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are required.
